bird.name: 戈芬氏凤头鹦鹉
bird.summary: 戈氏凤头鹦鹉（學名：Cacatua goffiniana，港台作戈芬氏鳳頭鸚鵡，英語：Tanimbar Corella、Goffin’s cockatoo）是鸚形目鳳頭鸚鵡科鳳頭鸚鵡屬下的一種白色鳥類。該物種主要分佈於印尼塔寧巴爾群島上，是當地常見的玉米田訪客。該物種為鳳頭鸚鵡…

relations.subject: 戈芬氏凤头鹦鹉
relations.evidence: It is classified as near threatened due to deforestation and cage-bird trade
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 戈芬氏凤头鹦鹉
relations.evidence: right|thumb|A pet juvenile Due to ongoing habitat loss on Tanimbar, limited range, and illegal hunting, the Tanimbar corella is evaluated as near threatened on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. It is listed on Appendix I of CITES. In the 1970s, Japanese loggers ravaged the islands
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 戈芬氏凤头鹦鹉

It is listed on Appendix I of CITES. In the 1970s, Japanese loggers ravaged the islands
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
